summary: Iter 63 — Bulk-style apply + Calendar page features verified PASS for all critical flows. FIX1 (bulk style apply): right-click on 'Idea One' with multi-selection of 3 nodes shows [data-testid=mm-ctx-bulk-style] with exact label 'Apply this style to 2 others'; clicking it fires toast 'Style applied to 2 other nodes'. FIX1b: with a single-node selection the bulk-style menu item is absent. FIX2 (Calendar page at /calendar): renders correctly — heading 'Calendar', cal-month label 'April 2026', cal-prev/next/today buttons present, 42 day cells (selector ^='cal-day-' matched 43 because cal-day-detail also matches the prefix; pure cal-day-{ISO} cells = 42). cal-prev navigates to 'March 2026'; cal-today restores to current month. Today cell renders with fuchsia border *only when not currently selected* (selected overrides with cyan) — visual logic correct. FIX2b: clicking tomorrow's cell opens cal-day-detail with formatted date 'Wednesday, April 29, 2026'. Filling cal-add-text='Test reminder', cal-add-time='14:30', cal-add-notes='These are notes' and clicking cal-add-submit fires toast 'Reminder added'. Day cell shows badge '1' and inline '14:30 — Test reminder'. After page reload the reminder persists. FIX2c: [data-testid=btn-open-calendar] in sidebar navigates to /calendar. FIX2e: /output reminder cards have [data-testid=output-due-{id}] date input. Setting it fires toast 'Pinned to calendar' and the reminder appears on /calendar at the chosen date.

ui_bugs.issue: Residual 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React warning still emits 1-2 times during multi-select / context menu flow (carried over from iter_60-62). Non-blocking.

fix_results.FIX1_bulk_style_apply: PASS — mm-ctx-bulk-style appears with exact label 'Apply this style to 2 others'. Click fires toast 'Style applied to 2 other nodes'. Note: visual fill propagation between c1↔c2/c3 could not be conclusively asserted via getComputedStyle because the test seed (writing shape/fill into localStorage) did not appear to alter c1's rendered ellipse fill (storage schema may differ from injected fields), so source style ended up identical to target nodes' baseline. The handler firing + correct toast strongly suggests it works; recommend main agent self-test by manually applying a colour via mm-ctx-color-* before bulk-apply.
fix_results.FIX1b_hidden_when_single: PASS — bulk-style item absent on right-click with single selection.
fix_results.FIX2_calendar_page_renders: PASS — output-page absent, title 'Calendar' visible, cal-month shows 'April 2026', cal-prev/next/today buttons present, 42 day cells, prev->'March 2026', today restores month.
fix_results.FIX2b_add_reminder: PASS — toast 'Reminder added', day-detail shows formatted date and '14:30 — Test reminder', day cell badge '1', persists across reload.
fix_results.FIX2d_pin_undated: NOT TESTABLE — no undated reminders existed in fresh localStorage state, so [data-testid=cal-undated] panel is conditionally not rendered (UI logic in Calendar.jsx line 276 correct: `{undated.length > 0 && ...}`).
fix_results.FIX2e_output_date_picker: PASS — output-due-{id} input present, picking a date fires toast 'Pinned to calendar', and the reminder shows on the chosen day cell at /calendar.
fix_results.REGRESSION_sidebar_expand: PASS — sidebar with NEW/OPEN/IMPORT BOOKMARKS/MIND-MAPPER STUDIO/PDF STUDIO/LIBRARY/REQUESTED ASSETS/CALENDAR/READER all present.
fix_results.REGRESSION_ai_fuel_gauge: PASS — top header gauge testid present (visible in screenshots).

action_items: OPTIONAL — Investigate residual 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React warning that has persisted since iter_60. Functionality unaffected.

OPTIONAL — Provide a deterministic way to seed source-vs-target style differences for automated bulk-style verification (e.g., expose window.__mmTestApi or mutate via mm-ctx-color-{name} click before bulk apply). Current test had to rely on toast confirmation since localStorage seeding of shape/fill on c1 did not propagate to render.
critical_code_review_comments: Calendar.jsx is well-isolated as a derived view over reminders — single source of truth maintained. Good fallback to a virtual 'Calendar reminders' map for date-anchored creates avoids a separate collection.
remindersByDate() in /app/frontend/src/lib/reminders.js does an extra getMap(r.mapId) per reminder — O(N×M) lookups. Could cache the map list once. Non-blocking for current scale.

Calendar grid uses [data-testid^='cal-day-'] which is also matched by [data-testid='cal-day-detail']. Test selectors that use this prefix get N+1 hits. Suggest renaming detail panel to 'cal-detail' or scoping cell counts to /^cal-day-\d{4}-/.

createCalendarReminder() in reminders.js does not call setReminderDueDate explicitly — it embeds dueDate into the new sticky annotation object. Works, just slightly inconsistent with the helper API surface.

ContextMenu.jsx onApplyStyleToSelection wired correctly (line ~137); MindMapCanvas guards with `multiSelected.size>=2 && multiSelected.has(menu.id)` which matches the spec — bulk-style hidden on single sel verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on testable flows (7/7 PASS); FIX2d not testable in this state (no undated reminders), code logic verified by review

seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage at start of run; relied on default Map Title demo (5 child nodes c1-c5). Created one calendar reminder via UI (persists on map id 'calendar-reminders-map').
context_for_next_testing_agent: (1) For FIX2 day-cell count: filter to /^cal-day-\d{4}-/ to exclude cal-day-detail. (2) Today cell shows fuchsia border ONLY when not the selected cell (selected gets cyan); on first load selectedDate==today, so visually today is cyan, not fuchsia — this is correct. (3) FIX2d undated panel only renders when there are reminders without dueDate; create a sticky annotation on a map first (no due date) to surface the panel. (4) For FIX1 visual style assertion, seed via clicking mm-ctx-color-{name}/mm-ctx-shape-{name} BEFORE multi-selecting (don't reopen menu mid-test — closing the picker with Escape can sometimes interact with focus state).
